profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Creativity thrives when people stop performing for strangers and start creating for their actual peers.
profile.working_on: Creating a Discord for underrepresented artists to showcase work without exposure metrics

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a profound desire to cultivate authentic connections among artists, nurturing a space where creativity can flourish without external pressures.
